skipped_layers.reason: Deterministic repository contract-smoke checks are more discriminating for this consumed-contract wording change than live model comparisons.
No external model transcripts were generated; checked-in markdown and JSON artifacts are the review surface.

GREEN routing test asserts metadata.execution_lane=quick_edit, quick_edit_label, and stale mirror drift guidance.
RED scope assertions failed before classification, target_repo, required_action, and human_decision_required were required.
GREEN scope-split test asserts required, optional, and forbidden pre-spec follow-up fields.
RED scope assertions failed before upstream semantic reference and dotfiles runtime-only exclusions were declared.
GREEN scope-split test asserts semantic-only runtime_loading=false and out-of-scope runtime sections.

with_skill.summary: GREEN contract-smoke scenarios passed with active contract and brainstorming guidance updates.

without_skill.summary: RED contract-smoke scenarios exposed missing consumed-subset assertions in baseline guidance.

delta.summary: Changed guidance and contract tests now enforce consumed dotfiles v4 semantics without importing runtime-only details.

run_summary.conclusion: Superpowers brainstorming now consumes the relevant v4 contract semantics while preserving the local semantic-only boundary.
